channel.title: +Articles on यजुर्वेदे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on यजुर्वेदे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: Orissan recension of
item.description: Source: here. Orissan recension of kANva shAkhA Orissa from ancient time remained land of vedic learning. It preserves distinct and very unique living tradition of paippalAda shAkhA ( of aTharva veda ) and kANva shAkhA ( of shukla yajurveda ). The Orissan version ( samskrita term being Utkala pATha ) of kANva samhitA is unique in nature having 41 adhyAyas and 2095 mantras ( according to some manuscripts 2100 ) mantras in contrast with printed vulgate version comprising 40 adhyAyas and 2086 mantras in total .
